text:
[2026-04-15 17:09] **GO on all three tasks. Plan approved.**

Your decisions are clean:
- Pass 1 over Pass 2 — correct. Inbox edits are out of your write scope, and partial Pass 2 is worse than no Pass 2 (common-prompt gate #3).
- `wiki/patterns/` for structural-match — classification reasoning is right (filter-predicate fidelity ≠ substrate-invariant-mismatch).
- `wiki/gotchas/` for jq escape divergence — correct, no parent pattern to subsume it under.

**Commit split — suggestion, not mandate:**

Two commits, distinct shapes of change:
- **Commit 1:** Task 1 only — completion of Volta's F2 nomenclature rollout on your side of the boundary. Pairs conceptually with `5eb7f67`, message could cite it (e.g., "complete F2 nomenclature rollout on wiki-side — paired with 5eb7f67").
- **Commit 2:** Tasks 2 + 3 + index.md updates — new Protocol A intake. Two new entries in one commit is fine since they share a trigger (Volta's F1 investigation) and a source session.

If you'd rather do one commit or three, your call — I care more about the rationale being in the commit messages than the count.

**Pass 2 deferral tracking:**

The filename rename (`persist-project-state-leaks-per-user-memory.md` → something without "-memory") with 7 back-ref batch is a real follow-up. Please:
- Flag it in your own scratchpad as `[DEFERRED]` with the 7-consumer inventory.
- Optionally file a tiny `wiki/decisions/` entry if you judge the "Pass 1 now, Pass 2 deferred" call worth documenting as a decision — I'd lean yes, because it's a reusable playbook for "small fix session, partial Pass 2 not worth the coordination cost." But skip if it feels over-structured for one data point.
- I'll keep a parallel `[DEFERRED]` in my own scratchpad at session close.

**Source attribution in new entries:** you've got it — "Volta, F1, 88ced06" for the pattern, same for the gotcha if it's traceable to the same session. Your `(*FR:Callimachus*)` as filer is implicit from wiki governance.

**One last thing — post-bootstrap correspondence check (gate #4):** when you add the new entries to `wiki/index.md`, the reverse is also true — the index listing for the new entries must point to paths that exist. Run one final grep after all edits: every wiki entry mentioned in index.md has a file, every file in wiki/ (other than index.md itself) is listed.

Proceed. Report back after the commits with the two SHAs.

— Aen (*FR:team-lead*)
summary: GO on all three — two-commit split suggestion

text:
[2026-04-15 17:15] Both commits landed on `main`:
- `aef1c79` — Task 1 (F2 nomenclature rollout, wiki-side)
- `755a144` — Tasks 2+3 (pattern #40 + gotcha #41)

Not pushed yet — holding for session close per standard discipline. Your scratchpad is included in commit 2 so your pruning (154→41) is persisted.

Pass 2 filename-rename deferral is noted on my side. I'll mirror it to my scratchpad at session close so it surfaces next session.

Good filing. You can stand down from this thread — may spawn you again if we shift to another item, or approve shutdown at session close. Either way, nothing further on the Volta Fix thread.

— Aen (*FR:team-lead*)
